global.description: The ad features a solid blue background with geometric shapes and text elements promoting a travel service.
global.main_message: Promoting the DriftPass service for easier travel bookings.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Various geometric shapes in lighter shades of blue are layered in the top area, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Central graphic area
elements.description: A large central area with a rounded shape and a square shape, both in a muted tone, creating a focal point.

elements.label: Additional shapes
elements.description: An additional rounded shape in the center, complementing the main graphic area.

elements.label: Overlay shape
elements.description: A rectangular overlay shape positioned centrally, enhancing the visual hierarchy.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in the top left corner, adding detail to the design.

elements.label: Unidentified element
elements.description: A small element located in the center bottom area, details are unclear.

elements.label: DriftPass title
elements.description: The text 'DriftPass' is prominently displayed in a bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Descriptive text
elements.description: The text 'Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap' is presented in a clear, readable font in the center.
elements.text_content: Fly smarter Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The text 'Shop now' is displayed in a bold, inviting font at the bottom of the ad.
